name: Chemistry & Materials Research
student_summary: Discover molecules and materials — from drugs to batteries.
overview: Discover molecules and materials — from drugs to batteries. Chemistry & Materials Research sits in the Physical Sciences family of Science & Research. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.

faqs: What does Chemistry & Materials Research pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹5 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹22 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Chemistry, Physics. Typical degrees: B.Sc Chemistry, + M.Sc + PhD. Alternatives exist: integrated bs-ms at iisers.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Chemistry & Materials Research evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Chemistry & Materials Research is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
